N.short_description: The number of students used to calculate the percentage

vax.short_description: Vaccine for which coverage is presented

value.long_description: The percentage of students who are up to date on the indicated vaccine

percent_surveyed.long_description: The percentage of students covered by the survey

survey_type.short_description: Type of survey used to collect the data
survey_type.long_description: Type of survey used to collect the data

wapo_county_vax_rate.long_name: County-level MMR or Overall Vaccination Rate
wapo_county_vax_rate.short_description: County-level vaccination rate for MMR or overall immunization compliance
wapo_county_vax_rate.long_description: County-aggregated vaccination rates for MMR vaccine or overall immunization compliance among school-aged children, compiled from state immunization data by The Washington Post. Rates vary by state in terms of whether MMR-specific or overall compliance rates are reported.

wapo_prepand_herd.short_description: Whether county achieved 95% vaccination rate before pandemic
wapo_prepand_herd.long_description: Binary indicator (y/n) of whether the county vaccination rate met the herd immunity threshold of 95% in the pre-pandemic period (2018-2020 school years)

wapo_postpand_herd.short_description: Whether county achieved 95% vaccination rate after pandemic
wapo_postpand_herd.long_description: Binary indicator (y/n) of whether the county vaccination rate met the herd immunity threshold of 95% in the post-pandemic period (2023-2025 school years)

wapo_school_name.long_description: Name of individual school reporting vaccination and exemption data

wapo_school_type.short_description: Type of school (public, private, other, or district)
wapo_school_type.long_description: Classification of school as public, private, other, or public school district

wapo_school_address.long_description: School address or closest available address for geolocation

wapo_students_enrolled.short_description: Number of students enrolled at the school
wapo_students_enrolled.long_description: Number of students (either just kindergartners or all students depending on state reporting) enrolled at the school

wapo_school_mmr_rate.long_description: Vaccination rate for 2 doses of the MMR (measles, mumps, rubella) vaccine at the individual school level

wapo_school_overall_rate.long_description: Overall vaccination compliance rate at the school level, indicating students are up-to-date on all required immunizations

wapo_school_medical_exemption_rate.short_description: Rate of medical exemptions across vaccines
wapo_school_medical_exemption_rate.long_description: Rate of medical exemptions across all vaccines at the school level

wapo_school_religious_exemption_rate.short_description: Rate of religious exemptions across vaccines
wapo_school_religious_exemption_rate.long_description: Rate of religious exemptions across all vaccines at the school level

wapo_school_personal_exemption_rate.short_description: Rate of personal exemptions across vaccines
wapo_school_personal_exemption_rate.long_description: Rate of personal (including philosophical or conscience-based) exemptions across all vaccines at the school level

wapo_school_nonmedical_exemption_rate.short_description: Rate of non-medical exemptions across vaccines
wapo_school_nonmedical_exemption_rate.long_description: Rate of non-medical exemptions (could include religious and/or personal) across all vaccines at the school level

wapo_school_overall_exemption_rate.short_description: Rate of all exemptions across vaccines
wapo_school_overall_exemption_rate.long_description: Overall rate of all exemption types across all vaccines at the school level

wapo_school_county.long_description: County name where the school is located

wapo_school_state.long_description: State abbreviation where the school is located

wapo_school_grade.long_description: Grade level of students for which vaccination data is reported

SchoolVaxView.name: SchoolVaxView
SchoolVaxView.location: Vaccination Coverage and Exemptions among Kindergartners
SchoolVaxView.organization: Centers for Disease Control and Prevention
SchoolVaxView.description: SchoolVaxView monitors vaccination coverage among U.S. school-aged children. Data are collected annually by states, territories, and select local jurisdictions through school vaccination assessments, which review student vaccination records at kindergarten entry. These data are made available by the CDC.
SchoolVaxView.restrictions: Public domain. CDC data is generally not subject to copyright restrictions.

WashingtonPost.name: The Washington Post School Vaccination Rates Database
WashingtonPost.description: The Washington Post compiled school vaccination rates from state health departments across the United States. This dataset includes both school-level and county-level vaccination rates, exemption data, and contextual information about herd immunity thresholds. Data spans multiple school years (2018-2025) and provides detailed immunization compliance information across public, private, and other school types. Source data was obtained through public records requests and state immunization dashboards.
WashingtonPost.restrictions: Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial-ShareAlike 4.0 International Public Licenses. Attribution to Washington Post US vaccination data
